notes: Two-view composition tracks the input photo but the silhouette is distorted with boxy fins and the linework is fragmented photo-trace clutter rather than clean FAO plate ink.
specific_issues: fins rendered as flat angular flaps instead of the rounded fan shape in the photo
mantle outline is jagged with stair-step artifacts rather than a single continuous curve
arms are not individually resolved — they read as mushy parallel strips with no clear count
suckers appear as scattered partial circles rather than consistent rings along arm edges
eye in the top view is barely indicated; bottom-view eye is present but tiny
broken/discontinuous outline strokes throughout, especially along the arm crown
internal stipple is mixed with short scribble fragments that look like trace noise
missing the dark chromatophore band at the head/mantle junction visible in the photo
tentacular club expansions on the long tentacles are not articulated
head-mantle proportions narrower than the photo, making the funnel/collar region ambiguous
